title: 23m Emerald Green Ribbon 25mm for Gift Wrapping, Satin Ribbon Emerald Green Christmas Ribbon Decorative Balloon Ribbon Fabric Thick Ribbon for Crafting Hair Bow Baby Shower Wedding Cake Decorations
features: 🎄 High Quality Material: This ribbon Made of durable PVC, which has tenacious and not easy to break, the feel of the ribbon is smooth, shiny and bright, mainly used to increase the festive atmosphere. It has a smooth and glossy surface that reflects light beautifully.

🎁 Wide usage: Our ribbons are easy to cut, can well meet your daily needs, such as wrapping presents, Champagne, Bouquet and decoring balloon, decoration, braided headbands. Suit for celebrating Christmas, birthday, wedding, graduation, baby shower, bride to be party, bachelor party and more.

🎀 Package includes: This package contains 1 roll of ribbon, a full 23 meters. We provide a variety of widths and colors for you to choose, enough for daily use in all environments, you can also share with friends and family.

🌈 Rich Colors and Styles: These ribbons come in 54 colors, available in 11 widths (3mm/6mm/10mm/15mm/20mm/25mm/30mm/40mm/50mm/75mm/10CM), 25 yards/22.86 meters long, and 3mm/6mm ribbon are 91 meters long, easy to cut properly. You can mix and match different colors and styles to create your own unique designs.
✎ NOTICE: Please don't use the ribbon to tie the balloon directly to avoid air leakage, just use the ribbon to decorate your balloon. Winding risk, Not suitable for children under 3 years old.
description: This satin ribbon is flexible and easy to work with. You can cut, fold, twist or tie it into any shape and design you want. It can also be ironed or steamed to remove wrinkles or creases. Specification Material: Polyester Color is rich, multi-size optional, solid satin ribbon. High colour fastness, non - fading, washable. Package included: 1 Roll Satin Ribbons Versatile polyester fabric ribbon Wide application Versatile ribbon, wide range of applications, especially for gift box packaging, invitations, floral design, handmade roses, festival and party decorations, baking packaging, bouquet ribbons, crafts, and more creative design Ribbon for Party decorations Perfect for party decorations, you can use your favorite ribbon to decorate wedding, birthdays, baby showers, events, celebrations, anniversaries, etc, Add atmosphere Ribbon for gift wrap, Upgrade your gifts High quality, cost-effective gift wrap ribbon, unlimited service let you shop without worry. You can choose different colors and sizes of ribbon to wrap your gift box; These colorful ribbons are suitable for a variety of occasions. Ribbon for flower Suitable for flower packaging, floral design, bridal bouquet, artificial flowers, flower basket decoration Decorative bow It can be used to make decorative bows, for festivals or crafts. Notice: 1.Away from fire, candles or other flammable items. 2.
